onViewRecycled(EventAdapter.ViewHolder) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventAdapter
 
OrganizerEventsRepository - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Repository class responsible for retrieving EventDetail data from Firebase Firestore for a specific organizer.
OrganizerEventsRepository() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.OrganizerEventsRepository
Constructs an OrganizerEventsRepository and initializes the Firestore database instance.
OrganizerEventsRepository(boolean) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.OrganizerEventsRepository
Protected constructor for test mode.
OrganizerEventsRepository.EventsCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for asynchronous event retrieval operations.
